features.description: CLI initializes a context graph store in .harness/context-graph/
steps: Run: python -m context_graph init
Verify .harness/context-graph/ directory is created with graph schema
Verify initialization message is printed

features.description: Record a DecisionTrace from an agent action (bug fix, review, validation failure)
steps: Run: python -m context_graph record --type fix --file src/foo.py --evidence 'commit abc123' --rationale 'off-by-one in pagination'
Verify DecisionTrace node is created in graph
Verify edges link to the referenced file

features.description: Query related incidents by file path
steps: Record 2+ DecisionTraces for the same file
Run: python -m context_graph query incidents --file src/foo.py
Verify all related traces are returned with timestamps and rationale
Record DecisionTraces across multiple files in one module
Run: python -m context_graph query decisions --module engine
Verify all traces for files in that module are returned

features.description: Query fix patterns by category (timeout, auth, null-pointer, etc.)
steps: Record 3+ fixes with category tags
Run: python -m context_graph query patterns --category timeout
Verify matching fix patterns are returned with frequency counts

features.description: Ingest git history into the context graph as CodeChange nodes
steps: Run: python -m context_graph ingest git
Verify CodeChange nodes are created for each commit
Verify file-level edges connect commits to files

features.description: Graph health check reports coverage metrics (nodes, edges, files with traces)
steps: Run: python -m context_graph health
Verify output shows total nodes, edges, files covered, files uncovered
Verify exit code 0
